name: Grilled Chicken and Avocado Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 lb boned and skinned chicken breasts, julienned
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the olive and sesame oils.
2. Add minced garlic, minced ginger root, salt, and minced Thai chili.
3. Marinate the chicken breast pieces for at least 4 hours.
4. Drain the marinade and grill the chicken on a pre-heated grill until thoroughly cooked.
5. Let the chicken cool to room temperature.
6. In a blender, blend lemon juice, garlic, honey, salt, and pepper.
7. With the blender running, slowly add olive oil and emulsify the dressing.
8. Divide spinach into four bowls.
9. Top each bowl with grilled chicken pieces, tomato slices, avocado, and croutons.
10. Drizzle the dressing over the salad.
